title: Compass Group India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Compass Group India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Compass Group India Digital Technologies in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Compass Group India Digital Technologies:
Compass Group India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Compass Group India Digital Technologies!
